---
title: "Data Quality Portal"
---

# Executive Summary



# Target Audit Status

| Target | Status | Pass/Fail |
|--------|--------|-----------|
| [calorimetry](targets/calorimetry.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [compositional](targets/compositional.qmd) | 249 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [ftnir](targets/ftnir.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [icp](targets/icp.qmd) | 147 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_availability](targets/mv_biomass_availability.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_composition](targets/mv_biomass_composition.qmd) | 1682 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_composition_extended](targets/mv_biomass_composition_extended.qmd) | 261 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_end_uses](targets/mv_biomass_end_uses.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_fermentation](targets/mv_biomass_fermentation.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_gasification](targets/mv_biomass_gasification.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_pricing](targets/mv_biomass_pricing.qmd) | 16 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [mv_biomass_sample_stats](targets/mv_biomass_sample_stats.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [pretreatment](targets/pretreatment.qmd) | 232 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [proximate](targets/proximate.qmd) | 271 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [ultimate](targets/ultimate.qmd) | 3 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [xrd](targets/xrd.qmd) | 0 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
| [xrf](targets/xrf.qmd) | 613 flagged | ⚠️ Issues |
